calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar May-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for the Petitioner.

The Court stated that it appeared that the Decedent lived with Joseph after the adoption, Joseph Zeitchick falied to appear and make an objection to the petition. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). Maury Mills, Jr. is confirmed as the sole surviving heir at law. All assets are to be distributed to Maury Mills, Jr.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar May-19-2009 Continued To May-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar May-05-2009 Continued To May-19-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
